title: DN17 2BU, Severn Trent Water Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/ZP3598EY/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Severn Trent Water Limited Installation name: Scunthorpe Sewage Treatment Plant Permit number: EPR/ZP3598EY/V004  "
